title: baccharoides pedunculata
intro: Baccharoides pedunculata, also known as the 'Pili' tree, is a tropical plant native to the Philippines and Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Baccharoides pedunculata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often made from its leaves and bark.
